summary: Frontend-only test of /admin/diary-calendar (Calendário Operacional do Diário). Verified login as super_admin, navigation, filters (school/class/year/month), API integration (GET /api/calendar/diary-state/{class_id}), summary chips, legend, day cells with status/icon/label/indicators, severity filter toggle, mobile list view, and data-testid coverage. All 16 user directives met.
critical_code_review_comments: DiaryCalendar.jsx is a single 1083-line file. Consider splitting into sub-components (Legend, SummaryChips, DayCell, DayDrillDown, OrphanEvidenceList, MobileDayRow) in a /components/diary-calendar/ folder to improve maintainability (>700 line file guideline).

fetchState() uses bare axios.get instead of centralized api service used elsewhere in app — consider unifying through services/api.js for consistency and CSRF/interceptor reuse (currently relies on axios.defaults.withCredentials being set globally).
buildMonthGrid pads tail to fill last week with null cells but those nulls produce empty <div> cells — fine, but consider rendering as <div role='gridcell' aria-hidden> for a11y.
STATUS_META values duplicate design_guidelines.json by hand. Long-term: import or generate from that JSON to guarantee single source of truth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: System 'today' is Maio 2026; default month loads correctly to current. Initial school selection happens once (defaultedRef), then class auto-selects first of selected school. Mobile breakpoint at md (≥768px). All key elements have data-testid. Drill-down sheet uses data-testid=day-modal-{date} with day-entries-list and day-entry-{idx} inside.
